---
title: "03_checkm"
author: "Aiden Bennett"
date: "2026-07-14"
output: html_document
---

### --- Step 3 - Check bin quality ---
This is the last step for the assembly, using checkm on the metabat output to check accuracy.

Once again, move to the main project repository, then make and move into one for checkm.

Check the length of all of the contigs, using 'cat ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta | bioawk -c fastx '{print length($seq),$name}' | sort -n' as the largest one will have been removed and we will need it.

Find the largest bin, and rename contig_XX from below with the name of the largest bin and run it in the terminal. Mine was contig_113
mkdir bins_bbd
cp ../metabat/bins_bbd/*.fa bins_bbd/
samtools faidx ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta contig_113 > bins_bbd/contig_113.fa

Now make a new slurm script with the following and run it with sbatch run_checkm_bbd.sh.
